name: Walmart Inc.
description: Walmart Inc. is an American multinational retail corporation that operates a massive chain of hypermarkets, discount department stores, and grocery stores. Founded by Sam Walton in 1962, the company has grown into one of the world's largest retailers, employing millions of associates globally. Walmart is a people-led, tech-powered omnichannel retailer dedicated to helping customers save money and live better through its extensive network of physical locations and robust e-commerce platforms. Headquartered in Bentonville, Arkansas, the company remains a dominant force in the global retail industry, continuously evolving its operations to meet changing consumer needs.
